reasoning: The betting markets and prediction platforms (Polymarket at 24% on Aug 7, Kalshi at 32% on Aug 11) value the probability of Artificial Intelligence winning TIME's Person of the Year for 2025 at roughly 25-30%. According to late-summer reporting, AI remains one of the top 3 contenders alongside Donald Trump and the newly elected Pope Leo XIV (the first US-born pope, who became the 1/1 favorite in June). Given Trump reportedly won the 2024 honor, a back-to-back win in 2025 is historically rare, leaving AI and Pope Leo XIV as the two strongest alternatives. The prediction markets directly capture the nuanced likelihood of these contenders being selected in December, and an estimate of 28% strongly reflects the prevailing consensus.
